Twisters (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $267,762,265Details
International Box Office $104,500,000
Worldwide Box Office $372,262,265
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,716,193
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,505,379
Total $9,221,572
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Kate Cooper, a former storm chaser haunted by a devastating encounter with a tornado during her college years now studies storm patterns on screens safely in New York City. She is lured back to the open plains by her friend, Javi to test a groundbreaking new tracking system. There, she crosses paths with Tyler Owens, the charming and reckless social-media superstar who thrives on posting his storm-chasing adventures with his raucous crew, the more dangerous the better.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$81,251,415 (30.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:71.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$155,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,151 opening theaters/4,170 max. theaters, 7.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $283,150,895

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 19th, 2024 (Wide) by Universal
July 19th, 2024 (IMAX) by Universal

July 11th, 2024 (Wide) (Indonesia)

Synopsis

Kate Cooper, a former storm chaser haunted by a devastating encounter with a tornado during her college years now studies storm patterns on screens safely in New York City. She is lured back to the open plains by her friend, Javi to test a groundbreaking new tracking system. There, she crosses paths with Tyler Owens, the charming and reckless social-media superstar who thrives on posting his storm-chasing adventures with his raucous crew, the more dangerous the better.
